channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Proposing a Permeable Resin Bound Gravel (RonaDeck)be placed in tree pit, 12th March
item.description:
Since the cycle hanger was placed there it means we have lost car space due to cars refusing to park upto the cycle hanger as they would have to get out of the car and step into the tree pit which is either filled with weeds or mud and soil.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lavers Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fence panel obstructing Telegraph Path next to 47 Hill Close, 12th March
item.description:
A fence panel previously reported and which report was closed today has again fallen down. The property owner at 53 Hill Close simply leaning it back up again has not resolved the issue. The panel has again damaged a neighbours fence and narrowly missed a pedestrian when it fell/blew down.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Hill Close, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole, 12th March
item.description:
Large pothole which has turned into a large crater in the road at junction with st pauls wood hill and leesons hill JW
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leesons Hill, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: School parents double parking, 12th March
item.description:
Parents double parking on Dorchester Avenue Da53an at 3pm is really causing room for concern as cars cannot get though. I turned around and to drive down murchinson Avenue to be obstructed with the same double parking issue. I live on Dorchester Avenue and it should not take me 30 minutes to drive down my street to reach my home.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 129, Dorchester Avenue, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling, 12th March
item.description:
Was cleared on Monday but more dog poo and poo bags have appeared!!!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lavell Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The Rubbish dumped in street, 12th March
item.description:
A bird cage and various bags of rubbish were left on the street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Selborne Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown tree at the base, 12th March
item.description:
The overgrown tree makes it difficult to walk safely on the pavement. Pedestrians need to go around the tree on to the road to walk by. The issue has been present for at least 2 months.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Melbourne Avenue, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on the grass outside No 1-9 Groom Road, 12th March
item.description:
This started off by being up against the wall of the flats on Friday 6/3 of carpet and carpet rolls. Since then it has been moved to where I have taken the photo and more rubbish is gathering daily

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tarpan Way, Broxbourne
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Court Farm Road SE9 Roundabout with The Crossway - missing plastic bollard on crossing refuge, 12th March
item.description:
Court Farm Road SE9 at the Roundabout with The Crossway - missing plastic bollard on crossing refuge - blown over and on side of road/pavement. Needs re-fixing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Court Farm Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on wall between Open Reach cabinets, 12th March
item.description:
Ulcer tag

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Denmark Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped in Banbury Rd Garages, 12th March
item.description:
I watched a man clearing out a garage today. He has left 2 large bags of rubbish on Banbury Rd Garages roadway. The rubbish came out of the garage with the white door.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Church Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 x plastic bags of wood cuttings dumped on pavement, 12th March
item.description:
2 x plastic bags of wood cuttings dumped on pavement causing obstruction
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Court Farm Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No parking zone sign rusted and snapped off, 12th March
item.description:
Signage on post outside Orchard Primary School rusted and has falling off today. Very sharp edges at ends of the rusty pole. Remaining part of pole rusted and leaning.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oxford Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags collected by road side cleaning an left for bin collection, but not taken, 12th March
item.description:
These bags were collected by the road side cleaning some were left by the post box but were taken by the black top bin collection, the ones left in this location always get forgotten and left please can they be collected before the next 2 week black top collection due to other item being dumped on them a car bumper being one

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tiverton Drive, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin Fire, 12th March
item.description:
There was a fire in the public bin which was extinguished but the bin was damaged. Needs replacing,
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dunton Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Electric bike chained onto pavement, 12th March
item.description:
Electric bike frequently chained to lamppost on the pavement blocking the pavement for everyone especially buggy users or wheelchair users

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burwash Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Spillage of stones and ballast on Upton Road near Hansol Road., 12th March
item.description:
Spillage of ballast and stones on road causing cars to have to slow down to avoid flicking up and hitting cars.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upton Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 12th March
item.description:
Litter and plastic all up the street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Barham Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Old plastic storage box, 12th March
item.description:
Dumped storage box

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Lane, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped forest home near road sign, 12th March
item.description:
This bike has moved around the road and now has been dumped in alverstone gardens by the road sign along with rubbish bags
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Tiverton Drive, New Eltham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
